reviews.author: Antara Roy
reviews.review_body: This school believes that sometimes it's not about doing something out of the box; it's about getting the basics right. Very focused approach towards the holistic development of the children. Wonderful staff, willing to  help and connect with the parents.

reviews.review_body: It was an absolute delight to visit this school in Greater Noida. Good infrastructure and facilities. Nice sports complex and playground. A safe school for kids in the hand of good management.
